git_context.head: 595298a004bb767c480ca8293d5fe664268be12c
git_context.subject: Post-build audit Content Engine content drafting governance core

validation_domains.name: state_hard_false_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate drafting governance state remains governance-only and all productive permissions are false.

validation_domains.name: draft_candidate_schema
validation_domains.purpose: Validate required conceptual draft candidate fields, commercial intent constraints and fail-closed missing field behavior.

validation_domains.name: draft_lifecycle_state
validation_domains.purpose: Validate lifecycle cannot enter final, scheduled, published or auto-approved states.

validation_domains.name: boundary_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate draft boundary blocks publish, queue write, execution, automation and human bypass phrases.

validation_domains.name: near_final_and_publishability_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate near-final/final copy and publishability score cannot produce final outputs.

validation_domains.name: monetization_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate monetization claims are evidence-bound and no guaranteed income/sales promises pass unblocked.

must_validate: ethical persuasion allowed only as metadata/review
validation_domains.name: marketing_ethics_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate persuasion stays ethical and blocks false scarcity, false urgency and exploitative manipulation.

validation_domains.name: channel_and_domain_policy
validation_domains.purpose: Validate supported channels/domains for Finca San Mateo, cacao, arriendos, Bravi, BramViss, digital channels, websites and future brands.

must_validate: Bravi contaminated by cacao markers blocked
validation_domains.name: domain_contamination_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate business/channel domain tone contamination is detected before draft review.

validation_domains.name: sensitive_data_guard
validation_domains.purpose: Validate human-field sensitive data is blocked while technical IDs avoid false positives.

validation_domains.name: argos_metadata_only_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate ARGOS compatibility remains metadata-only, no dependency, no cross-imports, no bridge build.

validation_domains.name: maturity_gate
validation_domains.purpose: Validate maturity promotion requires evidence/metrics/recovery but never opens draft creation or autonomy escalation.

validation_domains.name: evidence_and_traceability_contracts
validation_domains.purpose: Validate evidence_refs and traceability_refs are required and empty refs fail closed.

validation_domains.name: failure_policy_and_output_schema
validation_domains.purpose: Validate fail-closed result and governance output schema preserve hard-false operational flags.

must_validate: manifest status BUILT_PENDING_POST_AUDIT or post-audit traceable
validation_domains.name: manifest_contract
validation_domains.purpose: Validate manifest contract is canonical, hashable and preserves hard-false build state.

validation_domains.name: static_security_and_no_external_calls
validation_domains.purpose: Validate source remains pure governance: no external APIs, no subprocess, no browser automation, no publishable literals.

validation_domains.name: no_touch_and_productive_operations
validation_domains.purpose: Validate protected roots and productive operations remain untouched/false.
